findings.title: Wrong subscript in lattice coding gain formula (Section IV.B, line 746)
findings.snippet: Relative to $\gamma(\Lambda)=2^{-\rho(\Lambda)} d_{\text{min}}^{2}(\Lambda^{\prime})$, the gain $\gamma(\mathbb{C})$ is greater by the distance gain factor of $d_{\text{min}}^{2}(\mathbb{C}) / d_{\text{min}}^{2}(\Lambda)$
findings.explanation: The formula states γ(Λ) = 2^{-ρ(Λ)} d_min²(Λ') with a prime on Λ, but the established definition (Section II.E, line 300) is γ(Λ) = 2^{-ρ(Λ)} d_min²(Λ) — no prime. The Λ' subscript refers to the sublattice, which has a *larger* minimum distance than Λ. Substituting the erroneous formula into the surrounding argument yields γ(C) = 2^{-ρ(C)} d_min²(C) × d_min²(Λ')/d_min²(Λ), which contains a spurious extra factor and contradicts the correct result γ(C) = 2^{-ρ(C)} d_min²(C) derived three lines earlier at line 728. With the corrected d_min²(Λ), the d_min²(Λ) terms cancel correctly.
findings.fix: Replace d_min²(Λ') with d_min²(Λ) in the formula on line 746: γ(Λ) = 2^{-ρ(Λ)} d_min²(Λ).

findings.title: Garbled symbols in Table II column headers (line 574)
findings.explanation: Three column headers use incorrect symbols: (1) the first column shows 'A' instead of 'Λ'; (2) the second column shows 'k(A)' instead of 'k(Λ)'; (3) the fifth column shows 'ρ(Δ)' instead of 'ρ(Λ)'. All other columns in the same header and all references throughout the paper consistently use Λ. The symbol Δ does not appear in any formula in the paper. The table data itself (Z², D₄, E₈, etc.) confirms these are lattice parameters. Likely an OCR/rendering corruption of the Greek letter Λ → A and Λ → Δ.
findings.fix: Correct the Table II header to: | Λ | k(Λ) | κ(Λ) | r(Λ) | ρ(Λ) | d_min²(Λ) | γ(Λ) | ...

findings.title: Table XI Class II/III boundary corruption (line 980): d_min² value replaced by section header
findings.explanation: In Table XI, the last row of the Class II codes section (Λ₁₆/RΛ₁₆, 256 states) has its d_min² cell corrupted with the text 'Class III codes', which should have been a separate section-divider row. The d_min² value should be 16, since for a Class II code d_min²(C) = d_min²(Λ') = d_min²(RΛ₁₆) = 2 × d_min²(Λ₁₆) = 2 × 8 = 16 (as stated in the Class II description at line 967). This is confirmed by the adjacent γ=4 column: γ = 2^{-ρ} × d_min² = 2^{-2} × 16 = 4.
findings.fix: Separate the 'Class III codes' section header onto its own row and restore d_min² = 16 for the Λ₁₆/RΛ₁₆ Class II entry.

findings.title: Inconsistent dB rounding for γ = 2 in Discussion (line 1068)
findings.explanation: The value 10 × log₁₀(2) = 3.0103 dB is consistently rounded to '3.01 dB' throughout the paper — in the Introduction (line 78: 'γ(C) is 2^{-1}·4 = 2 (3.01 dB)'), in Section II.E (line 376: 'γ(E₈) = 2 (3.01 dB)'), in Table IV (line 806), in Table IX (line 908), and in Table XI (line 974). However, the Discussion section (line 1068) uniquely states '3.02 dB' for the same γ = 2.
findings.fix: Change '3.02 dB' to '3.01 dB' on line 1068 to match all other occurrences.
